title: yosys segfaults during MEMORY_MAP pass (on large design)
body:
## Steps to reproduce the issue
Run `yosys -o foo.blif -S ./yosys_rocket/*.v` (zipped rocket chip generated verilog here: [yosys_rocket.zip](https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys/files/2721887/yosys_rocket.zip)).

## Expected behavior

Successful generation of `foo.blif` or some relevant error message, generated intentionally.

## Actual behavior

Segfault in "7.17. Executing MEMORY_MAP pass":
```
[...] // lots of lines removed

7.16.10. Finished fast OPT passes.

7.17. Executing MEMORY_MAP pass (converting $mem cells to logic and flip-flops).
Mapping memory cell \_T_1161 in module \BTB:
  created 512 $dff cells and 0 static cells of width 1.
  read interface: 0 $dff and 511 $mux cells.
  write interface: 512 write mux blocks.

[...] // 647 lines removed

Mapping memory cell \ram in module \data_arrays_0_ext:
  created 512 $dff cells and 0 static cells of width 512.
  read interface: 1 $dff and 511 $mux cells.
  write interface: 8192 write mux blocks.
Mapping memory cell \ram in module \mem_0_ext:
  created 512 $dff cells and 0 static cells of width 64.
  read interface: 1 $dff and 511 $mux cells.
  write interface: 4096 write mux blocks.
Mapping memory cell \ram in module \mem_ext:
Segmentation fault (core dumped)
```

## Additional Info

Stack trace from GDB:
```
#0  0x0000556a0e8389da _ZSt10_ConstructIN5Yosys5RTLIL6SigBitEJRKS2_EEvPT_DpOT0_ (yosys)
#1  0x0000556a0e83ced8 _ZNSt6vectorIN5Yosys5RTLIL6SigBitESaIS2_EE19_M_range_initializeIN9__gnu_cxx17__normal_iteratorIPKS2_S4_EEEEvT_SB_St20forward_iterator_tag (yosys)
#2  0x0000556a0ea00562 handle_cell (yosys)
#3  0x0000556a0ea042f5 MemoryMapWorker (yosys)
#4  0x0000556a0e82c86f _ZN5Yosys4Pass4callEPNS_5RTLIL6DesignESt6vectorINSt7__cxx1112basic_stringIcSt11char_traitsIcESaIcEEESaISA_EE (yosys)
#5  0x0000556a0e82ccd5 _ZN5Yosys4Pass4callEPNS_5RTLIL6DesignENSt7__cxx1112basic_stringIcSt11char_traitsIcESaIcEEE (yosys)
#6  0x0000556a0e82ce4c _ZN5Yosys10ScriptPass3runENSt7__cxx1112basic_stringIcSt11char_traitsIcESaIcEEES6_ (yosys)
#7  0x0000556a0ebbf5be script (yosys)
#8  0x0000556a0ebbedc9 execute (yosys) 
#9  0x0000556a0e82c86f _ZN5Yosys4Pass4callEPNS_5RTLIL6DesignESt6vectorINSt7__cxx1112basic_stringIcSt11char_traitsIcESaIcEEESaISA_EE (yosys)
#10 0x0000556a0e82ccd5 _ZN5Yosys4Pass4callEPNS_5RTLIL6DesignENSt7__cxx1112basic_stringIcSt11char_traitsIcESaIcEEE (yosys)
#11 0x0000556a0e87731a _ZN5Yosys8run_passENSt7__cxx1112basic_stringIcSt11char_traitsIcESaIcEEEPNS_5RTLIL6DesignE (yosys)
#12 0x0000556a0e811584 main (yosys)
#13 0x00007f636a1f411b __libc_start_main (libc.so.6)
#14 0x0000556a0e81ff0a _start (yosys)
```
Also, the bt output from GDB:
```
#0  std::_Construct<Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit, Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit const&> (
    __p=0x556a31155c10) at /usr/include/c++/8/new:169
#1  std::__uninitialized_copy<false>::__uninit_copy<__gnu_cxx::__normal_iterator<Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit const*, std::vector<Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit, std::           allocator<Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit> > >, Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit*> (
    __result=__result@entry=0x556a31155c10,
    __last=<error reading variable: Cannot access memory at address 0x400>,
    __first=non-dereferenceable iterator for std::vector)
    at /usr/include/c++/8/bits/stl_uninitialized.h:83
#2  std::uninitialized_copy<__gnu_cxx::__normal_iterator<Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit const*, std::vector<Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit, std::allocator<Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit> >  >, Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit*> (__result=__result@entry=0x556a31155c10,
    __last=<error reading variable: Cannot access memory at address 0x400>,
    __first=non-dereferenceable iterator for std::vector)
    at /usr/include/c++/8/bits/stl_uninitialized.h:134
#3  std::__uninitialized_copy_a<__gnu_cxx::__normal_iterator<Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit const*, std::vector<Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit, std::allocator<Yosys::RTLIL::       SigBit> > >, Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit*, Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit> (
    __first=__first@entry=non-dereferenceable iterator for std::vector,
    __last=__last@entry=<error reading variable: Cannot access memory at address 0x400>, __result=__result@entry=0x556a31155c10)
    at /usr/include/c++/8/bits/stl_uninitialized.h:289
#4  0x0000556a0e83ced8 in std::vector<Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit, std::allocator<Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit> >::_M_range_initialize<__gnu_cxx::__normal_iterator<Yosys::    RTLIL::SigBit const*, std::vector<Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit, std::allocator<Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit> > > > (__last=..., __first=..., this=0x7ffd9c22f810)
    at kernel/rtlil.cc:3152
#5  std::vector<Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit, std::allocator<Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit> >::_M_initialize_dispatch<__gnu_cxx::__normal_iterator<Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit const*,  std::vector<Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit, std::allocator<Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit> > > > (
    __last=<error reading variable: Cannot access memory at address 0x400>,
    __first=non-dereferenceable iterator for std::vector, this=0x7ffd9c22f810)
    at /usr/include/c++/8/bits/stl_vector.h:1437
#6  std::vector<Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit, std::allocator<Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit> >::vector<__gnu_cxx::__normal_iterator<Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit const*, std::            vector<Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit, std::allocator<Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit> > >, void> (__a=...,
    __last=<error reading variable: Cannot access memory at address 0x400>,
    __first=non-dereferenceable iterator for std::vector, this=0x7ffd9c22f810)
    at /usr/include/c++/8/bits/stl_vector.h:546
#7  Yosys::RTLIL::SigSpec::extract (this=this@entry=0x7ffd9c22f9d8,
    offset=<optimized out>, length=length@entry=64) at kernel/rtlil.cc:3152
#8  0x0000556a0ea00562 in (anonymous namespace)::MemoryMapWorker::handle_cell (
    this=this@entry=0x7ffd9c22fe28, cell=<optimized out>)
    at passes/memory/memory_map.cc:177
#9  0x0000556a0ea042f5 in (anonymous namespace)::MemoryMapWorker::MemoryMapWorker (module=0x556a1041b5e0, design=0x556a10044180, this=0x7ffd9c22fe28)
    at passes/memory/memory_map.cc:349
#10 (anonymous namespace)::MemoryMapPass::execute (
    this=this@entry=0x556a0f0af220 <(anonymous namespace)::MemoryMapPass>,
    args=std::vector of length 1, capacity 1 = {...},
    design=design@entry=0x556a10044180) at passes/memory/memory_map.cc:369
#11 0x0000556a0e82c86f in Yosys::Pass::call (
    design=design@entry=0x556a10044180,
    args=std::vector of length 1, capacity 1 = {...}) at kernel/register.cc:232
#12 0x0000556a0e82ccd5 in Yosys::Pass::call (design=0x556a10044180,
    command="memory_map") at kernel/register.cc:212
#13 0x0000556a0e82ce4c in Yosys::ScriptPass::run (
    this=this@entry=0x556a0f0b2f40 <(anonymous namespace)::SynthPass>,
    command="memory_map", info="") at kernel/register.cc:320
#14 0x0000556a0ebbf5be in (anonymous namespace)::SynthPass::script (
    this=0x556a0f0b2f40 <(anonymous namespace)::SynthPass>)
    at /usr/include/c++/8/bits/char_traits.h:285
#15 0x0000556a0ebbedc9 in (anonymous namespace)::SynthPass::execute (
    this=this@entry=0x556a0f0b2f40 <(anonymous namespace)::SynthPass>,
    args=std::vector of length 1, capacity 1 = {...},
    design=design@entry=0x556a10044180) at techlibs/common/synth.cc:172
#16 0x0000556a0e82c86f in Yosys::Pass::call (
    design=design@entry=0x556a10044180,
    args=std::vector of length 1, capacity 1 = {...}) at kernel/register.cc:232
#17 0x0000556a0e82ccd5 in Yosys::Pass::call (
    design=design@entry=0x556a10044180, command="synth")
    at kernel/register.cc:212
#18 0x0000556a0e87731a in Yosys::run_pass (command="synth",
    design=0x556a10044180) at kernel/yosys.cc:948
#19 0x0000556a0e811584 in main (argc=10, argv=0x7ffd9c2309e8)
    at kernel/driver.cc:492
```
I also tried bumping the Linux-specific stack to 512 MB (in the spirit of commit 0acea354), but that made absolutely no difference at all.
